name: felipe-avinzanovoiceflow
description: felipe avinzano VoiceFlow - dictado privado y local para Windows, macOS y Linux
author: Felipe Avinzano

scripts.test: npm run build && node scripts/verify-brand-references.test.cjs && node scripts/verify-brand-references.cjs && node scripts/release-brand.test.cjs && node scripts/verify-legal-compliance.cjs && node scripts/verify-acceptance.test.cjs && node --check src/main.cjs && node --check src/preload.cjs && node --check src/overlay-preload.cjs && node --check src/db.cjs && node --check src/pcm-capture-worklet.js && node src/brand-config.test.cjs && node src/brand-migration.test.cjs && node src/brand-session-path.test.cjs && node src/brand-surfaces.test.cjs && node src/text-cleanup.test.cjs && node src/audio-quality.test.cjs && node src/voice-activity.test.cjs && node src/benchmark-utils.test.cjs && node src/benchmark-gates.test.cjs && node src/platform-capabilities.test.cjs && node src/auto-start.test.cjs && node src/transcription-metrics.test.cjs && node src/transcription-service.test.cjs && node src/native-transcription-host.test.cjs && node src/model-pack-manager.test.cjs && node src/history-write-queue.test.cjs && node src/whisper-profiles.test.cjs && node src/model-storage.test.cjs && node src/local-state.test.cjs && node src/app-preferences.test.cjs && node src/personal-data.test.cjs && node src/data-migrations.test.cjs && node src/input-helper.test.cjs && node src/paste-permission-notice.test.cjs && node scripts/run-with-electron-node.cjs src/db.test.cjs && node src/wav-encode.test.cjs && node src/whisper-cpp-output.test.cjs && node src/ggml-model-manager.test.cjs && node src/whisper-cpp-service.test.cjs && node src/transcription-engine.test.cjs
scripts.test:production: node scripts/verify-brand-references.test.cjs && node scripts/verify-brand-references.cjs && node scripts/release-brand.test.cjs && node scripts/verify-legal-compliance.cjs && node --check src/main.cjs && node --check src/preload.cjs && node --check src/overlay-preload.cjs && node --check src/db.cjs && node --check src/pcm-capture-worklet.js && node src/brand-config.test.cjs && node src/brand-migration.test.cjs && node src/brand-session-path.test.cjs && node src/brand-surfaces.test.cjs && node src/text-cleanup.test.cjs && node src/audio-quality.test.cjs && node src/voice-activity.test.cjs && node src/benchmark-utils.test.cjs && node src/benchmark-gates.test.cjs && node src/platform-capabilities.test.cjs && node src/auto-start.test.cjs && node src/transcription-metrics.test.cjs && node src/transcription-service.test.cjs && node src/native-transcription-host.test.cjs && node src/model-pack-manager.test.cjs && node src/history-write-queue.test.cjs && node src/whisper-profiles.test.cjs && node src/model-storage.test.cjs && node src/local-state.test.cjs && node src/app-preferences.test.cjs && node src/personal-data.test.cjs && node src/data-migrations.test.cjs && node src/input-helper.test.cjs && node src/paste-permission-notice.test.cjs && node scripts/run-with-electron-node.cjs src/db.test.cjs && node src/transcription-smoke.test.cjs && node src/wav-encode.test.cjs && node src/whisper-cpp-output.test.cjs && node src/ggml-model-manager.test.cjs && node src/whisper-cpp-service.test.cjs && node src/transcription-engine.test.cjs && node src/whisper-cpp-smoke.test.cjs
scripts.release:win: node scripts/fetch-whisper-binaries.cjs && npm run build && npm run build:native && npm run build:icons && npm run pre-release && electron-builder --win nsis --publish=never
scripts.release:mac: node scripts/fetch-whisper-binaries.cjs && npm run build && npm run build:icons && electron-builder --mac --publish=never
scripts.release:linux: node scripts/fetch-whisper-binaries.cjs && npm run build && npm run build:icons && electron-builder --linux --publish=never
scripts.release:dir: npm run build && npm run build:native && npm run pre-release && electron-builder --dir --win

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VoiceFlow necesita acceso al micrófono para transcribir tu voz localmente. El audio no se envía a servidores.
